title: Eigenvalues of the Neumann magnetic Laplacian in the unit disk
summary: In this paper, we study the first eigenvalue of the magnetic Laplacian with Neumann boundary conditions in the unit disk $\mathbb D$ in $\mathbb R^2$. There is a rather complete asymptotic analysis when the constant magnetic field tends to $+\infty$ and some inequalities seem to hold for any value of this magnetic field, leading to rather simple conjectures. Our goal is to explore these questions by revisiting a classical picture of the physicist D. Saint-James theoretically and numerically. On the way, we revisit the asymptotic analysis in light of the asymptotics obtained by Fournais-Helffer, that we can improve by combining them with a formula stated by Saint-James.
publication_venue: "Eigenvalues of the Neumann magnetic Laplacian in the unit disk," Journal of Mathematical Physics (Vol.66, Issue 8), 2025
